nodes.label: Wayvue Hero Sequence — dark green off-road SUV (Land Rover Defender-style) with rear-mounted spare tire and orange roof-top cargo box/kayak, driving away along a curving mountain highway at hazy golden-hour with pine forests and layered mountain silhouettes
Wayvue Landing Page Animation — looping road-trip hero sequence for the Wayvue travel brand, cinematic drive-away scenery evoking journey and adventure
